product_overview: Project Dance is a multi-tenant SaaS backend for dance academy management that provides authentication, academy-scoped CRUD for students, instructors, classes, attendance and payments, and SaaS subscription billing integration with Stripe.
core_goals: Enable secure authentication and session management for multi-tenant academy users
Provide academy-scoped CRUD operations (students, instructors, groups/classes, attendance, payments, reports) with strict authorization and tenant isolation
Support SaaS subscription management and Stripe webhook handling for billing
Enforce strong input validation and standardized error responses to prevent data corruption
Expose clear REST APIs to support frontend clients and integration tests

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: Register and authenticate users; create sessions or issue tokens used to access academy-scoped APIs.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/sign-up/email with body {email, password, name} -> Receive 200 with created User object
POST /api/auth/login with body {email, password} -> Receive 200 with JWT token or session cookie
GET /api/profile with Authorization: Bearer <token> (or session cookie) -> Receive 200 with user profile
POST /api/auth/sign-up/email with invalid email or weak password -> Receive 400 Validation error
POST /api/auth/login with wrong password -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: SaaS Subscription API
features.description: List public subscription plans and allow authenticated users to subscribe to a plan; handle Stripe events via webhooks.
user_flows: GET /api/saas/plans -> Receive 200 with Plan[]
POST /api/saas/subscribe with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {planId} -> Receive 200 with SubscriptionResponse
POST /api/saas/subscribe without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /api/saas/subscribe with Authorization and invalid planId -> Receive 400 or 422 Validation error
POST /api/saas/webhook (Stripe event) with valid Stripe signature and checkout.session.completed payload -> Receive 200 OK and subscription state updated
POST /api/saas/webhook with invalid signature -> Receive 400 Bad Request

features.name: Students API
features.description: Create and list students scoped to a specific academy; ensure only authorized academy users may access or modify academy student data.
user_flows: POST /api/academies/:academyId/students with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {name, email} -> Receive 200 with created Student
GET /api/academies/:academyId/students with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with Student[] including newly created student
POST /api/academies/:academyId/students with invalid email format -> Receive 400 Validation error
GET /api/academies/:academyId/students with Authorization: Bearer <token that lacks access to academyId> -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: Instructors API
features.description: List (and later manage) instructors for a specific academy; access restricted to authorized academy users.
user_flows: GET /api/academies/:academyId/instructors with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with Instructor[]
GET /api/academies/:academyId/instructors without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
GET /api/academies/:academyId/instructors with Authorization: Bearer <token that lacks access to academyId> -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: Groups / Classes API
features.description: Manage class groups (schedules, assigned instructors and students) scoped to an academy.
user_flows: POST /api/academies/:academyId/groups with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {name, schedule, instructorIds, studentIds} -> Receive 200 with created Group
GET /api/academies/:academyId/groups with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with Group[]
POST /api/academies/:academyId/groups with missing required field (schedule) -> Receive 422 Validation error
GET /api/academies/:academyId/groups with Authorization: Bearer <token that lacks access to academyId> -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: Attendance API
features.description: Record and retrieve attendance for students in academy classes; must validate student and group membership.
user_flows: POST /api/academies/:academyId/attendance with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {groupId, date, studentIdsPresent: []} -> Receive 200 with attendance record summary
GET /api/academies/:academyId/attendance?date=YYYY-MM-DD with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with attendance list for that date
POST /api/academies/:academyId/attendance with studentId not belonging to academy -> Receive 404 Not Found or domain error
POST /api/academies/:academyId/attendance without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Payments API
features.description: Record and list internal student payments (tuition, fees) for an academy; integrate with SaaS billing where needed.
user_flows: POST /api/academies/:academyId/payments with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {studentId, amount, currency, description} -> Receive 200 with Payment record
GET /api/academies/:academyId/payments with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with Payment[]
POST /api/academies/:academyId/payments with missing amount -> Receive 422 Validation error
POST /api/academies/:academyId/payments with Authorization: Bearer <token that lacks access> -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: Reports API
features.description: Provide academy-scoped financial and attendance reports for a given period.
user_flows: GET /api/academies/:academyId/reports/financial?period=YYYY-MM -> Receive 200 with financial report data (requires Authorization: Bearer <token>)
GET /api/academies/:academyId/reports/attendance?period=YYYY-MM with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with attendance report data
GET /api/academies/:academyId/reports/financial?period=invalid -> Receive 400 Bad Request or 422 Validation error
GET /api/academies/:academyId/reports/financial with Authorization: Bearer <token that lacks access> -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: SaaS Subscription API
features.description: Manage subscription plans and stripe webhooks

endpoints.description: List all students for an academy
Create a student for an academy
List all instructors for an academy
